reviewSummary.summary: Core login controls were identified, but the artifact contains duplicate password elements, unstable locators, decorative noise, and is missing important validation and recovery navigation elements required for robust login automation.

issues.message: Two separate password textbox elements represent the same functional control, creating ambiguity for downstream keyword and resource generation.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the most stable and semantically meaningful password field element using the stable id 'password'.

issues.message: Locator 'id=ion-input-0' appears framework-generated and brittle because Ionic incremental IDs can change between sessions or builds.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a stable attribute-based locator such as placeholder, associated label, form control name, or accessibility attribute.

issues.message: Locator 'id=ion-input-1' appears framework-generated and unstable for long-term automation maintenance.
issues.suggested_fix: Use the stable component id 'password' or another semantic attribute-based locator.

issues.message: Element name is too generic and does not clearly indicate it is an input field.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to 'password_textbox' for consistency and clarity.

issues.message: XPath locator depends entirely on visible text and may be brittle if UI text or capitalization changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a stable attribute, button text property, aria-label, or semantic selector if available.

issues.message: Background container is decorative/layout-only and provides no meaningful automation value.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the element from the approved page model.

issues.message: Forgot Password navigation element required by the workflow is missing from the page model.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a 'forgot_password_link' navigation element with a stable locator.

issues.message: No invalid login error message element is modeled even though failed authentication validation is a required workflow outcome.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a reusable authentication error banner/message element for failed login verification.

issues.message: Required field validation elements for username and password are missing despite explicit workflow validation requirements.
issues.suggested_fix: Add username required validation message and password required validation message elements.

issues.message: No explicit login page state indicator or form container element exists to verify the login modal/view is open from the Home page.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a stable login form container or login dialog title element for page state verification.

approved_elements.name: password_textbox
approved_elements.description: Masked password input field for authentication.
